popularStory.headline: Memorable
popularStory.description: He fought in the Battle of the Standard on 22 August 1138, when the Scots were totally defeated at Northallerton, Yorkshire.1 In 1174 he was one of the hostages for King William the Lion [Scotland]. …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus於1118年出生在蘇格蘭Forfarshire時，他的父親First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich29歲，母親Fynbella Mearns18歲。他於大約1135年與Sybil of Dunbar結婚。他去世於1187年在他的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus于1118年出生在苏格兰Forfarshire时，他的父亲First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich29岁，母亲Fynbella Mearns18岁。他于大约1135年与Sybil of Dunbar结婚。他去世于1187年在他的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Gille

variants.name: Brie
meanings: Variant spelling of Bree , altered in form to coincide with the name of a district in northern France (so called from Late Latin bracia ‘marshland’) famous for its production of a variety of soft cheese. This is now a relatively common first name in Australia.

en.lifeSummary: When Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus was born in 1118, in Forfarshire, Scotland, his father, First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich, was 29 and his mother, Fynbella Mearns, was 18. He married Sybil of Dunbar about 1135. He died in 1187, in his hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus est né en 1118, à Forfarshire, Écosse, son père, First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Fynbella Mearns, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Sybil of Dunbar environ 1135. Il est décédé en 1187, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus 1118 in Forfarshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich 29 und seine Mutter Fynbella Mearns 18. Er hat um 1135 Sybil of Dunbar geheiratet. Er starb 1187 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus è nato il nel 1118 nel Forfarshire, Scotland, il suo padre, First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Fynbella Mearns, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Sybil of Dunbar circa 1135. Morì nel 1187, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angusが1118年にスコットランドForfarshireで生まれた時，父First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaichは29歳，母Fynbella Mearnsは18歳であった。約1135年にSybil of Dunbarと結婚した。彼は1187年に故郷で69歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus(이)가 1118년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Fynbella Mearns(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1135년 Sybil of Dunbar(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1187년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus nasceu em 1118, em Forfarshire, Scotland, seu pai, First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Fynbella Mearns, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil of Dunbar aproximadamente 1135. Ele faleceu em 1187, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus родился в 1118 г. в местности Forfarshire, Шотландия, его отцу по имени First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Fynbella Mearns, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil of Dunbar около 1135 г. Он умер в 1187 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus nació en 1118, en Forfarshire, Scotland, su papá, First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Fynbella Mearns, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sybil of Dunbar aproximadamente 1135. Murió en 1187, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido.
